creative.title: Microsoft launches $2.5 billion "Frontier Company" to embed 6,000 AI engineers inside enterprise clients
creative.summary: Microsoft is investing $2.5 billion in a new unit called "Frontier Company" that puts 6,000 engineers directly at enterprise customers. The goal is to integrate AI into core processes with measurable ROI, not more experimentation. Microsoft is positi
creative.content:
Microsoft is investing $2.5 billion in a new unit called "Frontier Company" that puts 6,000 engineers directly at enterprise customers. The goal is to integrate AI into core processes with measurable ROI, not more experimentation. Microsoft is positioning itself as a platform-neutral alternative to OpenAI and Anthropic, which push their own models through their own deployment companies.

The five-year-old is given internet-based homework every week. And they are both absolutely repulsed by the idea of smoking. That was not the prevailing sentiment when I was young.…

research.title: PACE: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Plausible and Actionable Counterfactual Explanations
research.summary:
arXiv:2607.01306v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Counterfactual explanations explain machine learning predictions by identifying minimal input changes that would alter a model's decision. Although many existing methods successfully generate predictio
research.content:
arXiv:2607.01306v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Counterfactual explanations explain machine learning predictions by identifying minimal input changes that would alter a model's decision. Although many existing methods successfully generate prediction-changing alternatives, they often produce unrealistic or infeasible recommendations due to a lack of explicit mechanisms for incorporating domain knowledge and intervention constraints. Neuro-symbolic AI offers a promising direction by combining da

research.title: Auto-FL-Research: Agentic Search for Federated Learning Algorithms
research.summary:
arXiv:2607.01366v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Federated learning (FL) research often depends on many small but consequential algorithmic choices: optimizer variants, server aggregation rules, local training schedules, normalization, regularization
research.content:
arXiv:2607.01366v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Federated learning (FL) research often depends on many small but consequential algorithmic choices: optimizer variants, server aggregation rules, local training schedules, normalization, regularization, and model architecture. These choices are expensive to explore manually and difficult to compare fairly when candidate changes can also alter the FL training or evaluation path. In this work, we present Auto-FL-Research (AFR), a constrained coding-

culture.content:
As imaging tools become more sophisticated, online predators are using images of children to make extreme pornography

A teenager has been charged with murder after a 15-year-old boy was discovered with fatal stab wounds outside a community medical centre.
AAP reports the boy was found critically injured outside Craigieburn Community hospital in Melbourne’s north about 7.50pm on Wednesday. A staff member from the clinic rushed to his aid and delivered CPR but he died at the scene.
